economic_notes: First Nation is member of Sto:lo Nation in Fraser Valley near Chilliwack BC. Has investments in forestry, environmental services, and property rental through GBEs. Owns Taxation Centre. Jointly owns SAY Land Building with two other First Nations. Large capital projects underway (projects in progress $15.4M). Transferred ownership interests in Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry LP and Centre Creek LP into Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe LP during year.
notes: Large surplus of $18.8M driven by ISC funding of $13.2M (includes $4.4M in grants/projects vs budget of $0) and strong investment income. Deferred revenue dropped dramatically from $3.79M to $65K as $2.56M ISC deferred revenue and $1.18M development cost charges were recognized. Significant capital expenditures of $11.5M with projects in progress growing to $15.4M. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($13,230,261) + FNHCA ($1,038,362) + MCFD ($90,000) + FNESC ($160,238) + School District #33 ($13,490) + Sto:lo Service Agency ($55,324) + CMHC ($0) = $14,587,675 plus grants/other revenues of $4,442,620 less non-government portions; simplified here as ISC + FNHA + MCFD + FNESC + SD33 + Sto:lo = $14,587,675 noting grants line may include non-government sources. OSR includes property taxes, FNGST, gaming, interest, rental, GBE income. Ownership interests in two LPs transferred to TTLP during year. Honoraria paid of $174,570.
